style.note: STYLE banks are indexed as proprietary containers; names/chunks are candidates only.

pad.note: PAD payloads are not decoded; scanner records safe container metadata when files exist.

pcm.note: PCM sample payloads are counted and indexed only; audio/sample content is not decoded.

diagnostics.message: No PAD files were present in this SET.

logs.message: Indexed 99 PCM files without reading sample payloads.

parserDiagnostics.message: No PAD files were present in this SET.

parserLogs.message: Indexed 99 PCM files without reading sample payloads.
